history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with dark, voluminous, swept-back hair is sitting on the ground, leaning against a set of weathered, metal stairs. He is wearing a black leather jacket unzipped over a vertically striped blue and white button-down shirt, dark wash jeans, black socks, and black leather loafers with a fringe detail. He is holding a lit cigarette to his lips with his right hand, which also sports a large, ornate silver ring on his index finger and a dark watch on his wrist. His left hand rests on his lap, holding a small, white object, possibly a pack of cigarettes or a phone. To his left, on the ground, is a white smartphone. The background consists of the textured, grey concrete ground and the metallic, horizontal slats of the stairs, which appear to be outdoors in an urban or industrial setting, possibly at night or in low light conditions, as indicated by the shadows and the slightly grainy texture of the image. The overall mood is contemplative and somewhat edgy, with a focus on the man's pose and his interaction with the cigarette. The color palette is dominated by dark tones of black, grey, and deep blue, with the white stripes of the shirt and the light of the cigarette providing subtle contrast. The lighting is dim, casting soft shadows and highlighting the textures of the clothing and the environment.
